_note: url()-only seeds. wire matrix already covers +/-/: ; oracle-verify-rto-cto activates non-default verify/rto/cto. oracle-attach-as activates the deferred `attach-as` key (upstream form serialises it when non-default; form.ts constructs-but-drops it) so rule 2 actually compares a case where it is emitted — form-only (json/xml never emit it).
